rationale: Release is not supported because neither validated controlling metric was supplied: both evidence requests returned ambiguous access responses with no evidence ID. The visible 12% raw retention and 1,000 raw rows are explicitly non-controlling, so they cannot establish bot-adjusted 30-day retention of at least 10% and eligible sample size of at least 500. Repeated inability to obtain the authoritative record warrants escalation rather than release.
uncertainty: The bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size for synthetic segment S-9 remain unknown; either, both, or neither threshold may be satisfied.
